tasks.name: Implement PMP-WD optimizer and instrumented training
tasks.description: Implement PMP-WD bang-bang controller in optimizers.py: lambda*(t) = Lambda_max * I(<p(t), w(t)> > 0) using momentum buffer as costate proxy. Extend train_sgd.py to log diagnostics per epoch: delta_t (alignment), ||w_t||, ||g_t||, r_t, V_t (Lyapunov value), certified band bounds [lambda_min(t), lambda_max(t)]. Add Hessian-based L estimation (power iteration every 20 epochs). Output diagnostics.jsonl alongside epoch_metrics.jsonl.

pilot.pass_criteria: PMP-WD optimizer runs without error on 5-epoch CIFAR-10 smoke test; diagnostics.jsonl contains all required fields

tasks.name: Pilot: PMP-WD on CIFAR-10/ResNet-20
tasks.description: Run PMP-WD on CIFAR-10/ResNet-20 for 200 epochs, seed 42. Verify convergence, check bang-bang switching in lambda(t) trajectory, compare accuracy to constant WD baseline (90.13%). Log full diagnostics.

pilot.pass_criteria: Accuracy >= 88% (within 2% of constant baseline 90.13%); no divergence; lambda(t) shows clear bang-bang switching pattern

visualizations.description: PMP-WD lambda(t) switching trajectory showing bang-bang behavior

tasks.name: Full: PMP-WD on CIFAR-10/ResNet-20 (3 seeds)
tasks.description: Run PMP-WD on CIFAR-10/ResNet-20 for 200 epochs with seeds 42, 123, 456. Compare to 7 existing methods from iter_003. Log full diagnostics including V_t, certified band, alignment. This is the primary validation of Theorem 4.

visualizations.description: CIFAR-10 results: 8 methods x accuracy/generalization gap

tasks.name: Full: PMP-WD on CIFAR-100/ResNet-20 (3 seeds)
tasks.description: Run PMP-WD on CIFAR-100/ResNet-20 for 200 epochs with seeds 42, 123, 456. Compare to 7 existing methods from iter_003. Log full diagnostics.

tasks.name: Instrumented reruns: 5 methods on CIFAR-10/ResNet-20 with diagnostics
tasks.description: Rerun constant, cwd_hard, cosine_schedule, swd, no_wd on CIFAR-10/ResNet-20 with full diagnostic instrumentation (certified band, alignment, V_t, norms). 3 seeds each = 15 runs. Needed because iter_003 did not log diagnostic quantities. These runs validate H1 (certificate) and H3 (subsumption).
tasks.note: 5 methods can run in parallel on 5 GPUs (1 GPU each), then repeat for remaining seeds

visualizations.description: Certified band [lambda_min, lambda_max] with method trajectories overlaid
Lyapunov function V_t decay curves for all methods
Alignment trajectory delta_t across training for each method

tasks.name: VGG-16-BN on CIFAR-100 (8 methods x 3 seeds)
tasks.description: Run 8 WD methods (no_wd, constant, cosine_schedule, cwd_hard, swd, half_lambda, random_mask, PMP-WD) on CIFAR-100/VGG-16-BN, 200 epochs, 3 seeds each = 24 runs. VGG-16-BN CIFAR-10 already done in iter_005 (21 runs). This completes multi-architecture validation on CIFAR-100.
tasks.note: 8 methods run in parallel (1 GPU each), repeat 3x for seeds. VGG-16-BN is ~3x slower than ResNet-20.

tasks.name: Complete NoBN ablation (H5): 8 methods on ResNet-20-NoBN
tasks.description: Complete the NoBN ablation for H5. From iter_005: constant (3 seeds done), cwd_hard (3 seeds done), no_wd (1 seed done). Need: no_wd seeds 123/456 + cosine_schedule/swd/half_lambda/random_mask/PMP-WD all 3 seeds. Total: 17 new runs. CIFAR-10/ResNet-20-NoBN, 200 epochs. Critical for testing whether alignment-aware WD differentiates by >1% without BN.
tasks.note: Run up to 8 in parallel. ResNet-20-NoBN may converge differently; LR may need reduction (0.05 vs 0.1). Pilot first.

pilot.pass_criteria: cosine_schedule and PMP-WD both converge on NoBN; no method diverges

visualizations.description: BN vs NoBN accuracy spread across 8 methods

tasks.name: Pilot: ImageNet/ResNet-50 training setup verification
tasks.description: Verify ImageNet training pipeline works: download check, data loading, ResNet-50 instantiation, 2-epoch training with DDP on 2 GPUs. Constant WD, batch size 256, LR 0.1. Must complete without OOM or data errors. Previous ImageNet attempts all FAILED -- diagnose and fix root cause first.

pilot.pass_criteria: 2-epoch training completes without error; top-1 accuracy > 5% (sanity check); data loading throughput > 500 img/s

tasks.name: Full: ImageNet/ResNet-50 (4 methods x 3 seeds)
tasks.description: Run constant, cwd_hard, cosine_schedule, PMP-WD on ImageNet/ResNet-50, 90 epochs, 3 seeds each = 12 runs. DDP on 2 GPUs per run, batch 256. Track diagnostics every 5 epochs (use 10% subsample for full-batch alignment -- full ImageNet too expensive). Expected 4-6 hours per run, total ~24-36 GPU-hours.
tasks.note: 4-6 hours per run. With 8 GPUs, run 4 jobs x 2 GPUs each in parallel = 3 rounds for 12 runs. Exceeds 60-min budget per project constraint override for ImageNet.

visualizations.description: ImageNet results: 4 methods x top-1/top-5 accuracy

tasks.name: Cumulative alignment correlation grid (H2)
tasks.description: Test H2: cumulative alignment predicts generalization better than worst-case. Grid: 4 WD strengths x 4 schedules x 2 architectures x CIFAR-10 x 3 seeds = 96 configs. Many overlap with existing runs. Compute full-batch alignment every 10 epochs. Compute Spearman correlations for bar_delta vs gen_gap and sup_delta vs gen_gap. Bootstrap 95% CIs.
tasks.note: Many configs reuse existing data. New configs: ~50 runs at ~10 min each (CIFAR-10 is fast). Schedule across 8 GPUs.

pilot.pass_criteria: Full-batch alignment computation works; at least one |rho| > 0.3

visualizations.description: Cumulative alignment vs generalization gap scatter plot with Spearman rho
Worst-case alignment vs generalization gap scatter plot

tasks.name: Generate all figures and tables for the paper
tasks.description: Aggregate all experiment results and generate: (1) Figure 1: certified band with method trajectories, (2) Figure 2: PMP-WD bang-bang vs CWD mask, (3) Figure 3: BN vs NoBN spread, (4) Figure 4: alignment heatmap, (5) Figure 5: cumulative vs worst-case alignment correlation, (6) Figure 6: V_t curves, (7) Tables 1-3. Generate publication-quality matplotlib/seaborn figures saved as PDF.

shared_resources.name: iter_003 CIFAR-10/100 ResNet-20 (7 methods x 3 seeds)
iter_005 VGG-16-BN CIFAR-10 (7 methods x 3 seeds)

summary.critical_path: impl_pmpwd -> pilot_pmpwd_cifar10 -> [full_pmpwd_cifar10 | full_pmpwd_cifar100 | vgg16bn_cifar100 | nobn_complete] -> analysis
summary.parallelism: Phase 1/2/3 tasks can run in parallel once PMP-WD pilot passes. ImageNet is independent after setup. Alignment grid depends on instrumented reruns.
key_risks: PMP-WD diverges: fallback to continuous soft approximation lambda_t = Lambda_max * sigmoid(beta * <p,w>)
ImageNet fails again: diagnose data path / DDP config issues first in pilot; CIFAR-100 + VGG provides intermediate scale
Certified band too narrow: this IS a finding supporting H5
L estimation unstable: use gradient Lipschitz proxy instead of Hessian
